description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows build that runs on pull requests and pushes to the master branch or tags starting with v*. The workflow has three jobs: winstore, mingw, and winmvsc, all running on windows-latest. The winstore job checks out code, installs dependencies, builds, creates a certificate, sets up the Visual Studio shell, deploys, and uploads the build. The mingw job checks out code, installs dependencies, sets up msys2 and mingw-w64, and builds using a matrix strategy for different environments. The winmvsc job checks out code, installs Qt, sets up the Visual Studio shell, installs dependencies, and builds.
